name: subschema
description: Modern React form framework with TypeSpec schema authoring and diblob DI
author: Justin Spears

scripts.lint:packages: pnpm -r --filter '@subschema/react' --filter '@subschema/typespec' --filter '@subschema/create' exec publint && pnpm -r --filter '@subschema/react' --filter '@subschema/typespec' --filter '@subschema/create' exec attw --pack . --ignore-rules cjs-resolves-to-esm
